item.description: Sky Sports Premier League @SkySportsPL · 12s En respuesta a @SkySportsPL Watch Super Sunday live! nowtv.com Watch Premier League Live on Sky Sports on NOW Watch live Premier League football on Sky Sports with a NOW Sports Membership and enjoy the biggest games from the EPL – plus access to the EFL, WSL and much more.

item.description:
Everton @Everton · 33s En respuesta a @Everton 6' So close to the opening goal! Beto glances Garner's cross towards the bottom corner but it's kept out by a fine save.
[0-0] #EVELIV 2 118

item.title: J_Tanswell: The Athletic | Football reposteó Jacob Tanswell @J_Tanswell · 3min Inside two minutes, #AVFC are 1-0 up. A move that enc
item.description: The Athletic | Football reposteó Jacob Tanswell @J_Tanswell · 3min Inside two minutes, #AVFC are 1-0 up. A move that encapsulates this Villa - Rogers drifts infield, receives on half turn and plays central. Watkins, Barkley, Tielemans, Onana combine for short passes before McGinn reaches the byline from Cash's pass for Watkins to head in. 1-0 2 5 44 1 mil
